summary: Iteration 21 — Procurement Phase B (Material Allocations + Asset Lifecycle + Challans). Backend pytest 22/22 PASS (test_iteration21_phase_b.py against the public preview URL). Frontend Playwright walkthrough as admin@erp.com verified: /app/material-allocations renders allocations-page with alloc-add; Issue dialog has alloc-kind, alloc-item-select, alloc-item-name, alloc-qty, alloc-unit, alloc-to-type, alloc-project, alloc-date, alloc-return-date, alloc-returnable, alloc-condition, alloc-remarks, alloc-save; list contains 1 row with alloc-return-{id} button. /app/asset-lifecycle renders asset-lifecycle-page + asset-select (native <select>); selecting an asset shows 4 sections (Depreciation, AMC, Calibration, Warranty), each with an Add button at testid lifecycle-{dep|amc|cal|warr}-add — opening each dialog reveals the documented fields (dep-period, dep-amount, amc-vendor/start/end, cal-by/date/result, warr-vendor/start/expiry) plus lifecycle-save. /app/challans renders challans-page + challans-add; create dialog has ch-type, ch-from, ch-to, ch-vehicle, ch-driver, ch-phone, ch-dispatch, ch-add-item, ch-item-0-name/qty, ch-save; list shows 3 challan-row-{id} with view/receive/delete actions; View dialog shows a real QR canvas at challan-qr-block PLUS the e-signature stamp panel ('RECEIVED & SIGNED · By TEST_Recv · User: Super Admin · ts · IP'). Sidebar exposes nav-allocations, nav-asset-lifecycle, nav-challans under Commerce. Procurement workspace tiles include dept-link--app-material-allocations, dept-link--app-asset-lifecycle, dept-link--app-challans. Regression: procurement-dashboard, prs-page, rfqs-page, grn-page all still render (clients page renders too but it does not expose a clients-page root testid — pre-existing).

issues: Asset selector is a native <select> rather than the shadcn Select component used elsewhere — slightly inconsistent with the rest of the UI. Also there is no inline empty-state when an asset has no depreciation/AMC/calibration history (the body simply collapses); a 'No records yet' row would improve clarity.

When alloc-item-select is set, alloc-item-name and alloc-unit remain editable free-text fields rather than being auto-filled / locked from the chosen inventory item. A user can save an allocation whose item_name does not match the linked item_id.

QR canvas does not render the human-readable challan number above it inside the print/PDF-friendly area separately from the QR caption text; if the QR is captured by camera-only workflows the rendered caption (CHALLAN:CH-2026-####|<uuid>) is good — but consider printing the challan_no in larger type for ops who scan and read together.

action_items: (LOW) Review request expected dialog Add-button testids 'add-dep / add-amc / add-cal / edit-warr' but the actual testids in AssetLifecycle.jsx are 'lifecycle-dep-add / lifecycle-amc-add / lifecycle-cal-add / lifecycle-warr-add'. Either rename to the documented form or update the spec — testing relied on the actual testids and they all work.

(LOW) On the Allocations Issue dialog, when an inventory item is picked, auto-fill alloc-item-name and alloc-unit from the inventory row and make them read-only so the persisted item_name cannot drift from item_id.
(LOW) Add an inline empty-state in each Asset Lifecycle section (e.g., 'No depreciation entries yet — click Add to record one').

(LOW) /receive endpoint accepts a freeform receiver_name with no minimum length — empty/whitespace strings would be stored as the e-signature 'name'. Add a Pydantic Field(min_length=1) on ChallanReceiveIn.receiver_name.
critical_code_review_comments: materials_router.create_allocation: stock guard reads inventory.quantity but the decrement uses $inc without a conditional filter — under concurrent issues the same item could be over-issued (race condition). Use a conditional update {id, quantity: {$gte: qty}} with $inc and check matched_count, or wrap in a transaction.

materials_router.delete_allocation: reverses inventory inward without checking whether the original outward inventory_transactions row was reversed/voided — the audit chain shows the outward txn still exists, but inventory math is correct only because we $inc back. Consider also writing a voiding inventory_transactions row (txn_type='void' or similar) so the ledger stays consistent.

materials_router.record_return: when kind='asset' is partially returned, the asset's allocated_to fields are NOT reset until status='returned' — that's correct, but there is no UI flow for partial asset return (an asset is a single unit), so partial-return on kind='asset' is a logical hole. Add a guard: if kind='asset', enforce returned_qty == quantity.

materials_router.create_challan: for inter_site_transfer there is NO stock guard before the $inc decrement — if an item has 1 unit on hand and a transfer of 5 is created, inventory.quantity will go to -4. Add the same `avail < qty` check used in allocations.

materials_router.receive_challan: e_signature stamp includes ip from request.client.host which behind k8s ingress will resolve to the cluster proxy IP, not the real client IP. Read X-Forwarded-For (first hop) when present, otherwise fall back to request.client.host.

materials_router.add_amc unconditionally stamps amc_active=True + amc_expiry=end_date even if the start_date is in the future or the new AMC ends earlier than an existing active one (chronological hole). Compute amc_active from the max end_date across active AMCs.

materials_router.add_depreciation does NOT prevent duplicate (asset_id, period) rows; the same period can be recorded twice and current_book_value will be overwritten by whichever post arrives last. Add a unique index on {asset_id, period} or upsert.

materials_router.set_warranty filters out None values when updating — that means clearing a warranty (sending warranty_expiry=null) is impossible via this endpoint. Either accept explicit nulls or expose a DELETE /warranty.

materials_router does NOT clean up orphaned material_allocations rows when the referenced inventory item is deleted — consider a soft-delete guard on /api/inventory/{id} when allocations.status='issued'.

Frontend MaterialAllocations/AssetLifecycle/Challans pages do not surface backend error toasts on save/delete failures (same pattern flagged in iter-20 for PR/RFQ/GRN pages). A 400 response is silently swallowed.
MaterialAllocations Issue dialog allows submitting with quantity=0 client-side (only the backend rejects with 400) — add HTML5 min=0.01 / required validation client-side to fail fast.

Challans 'ch-item-0-qty' etc. uses positional testids — when a row is removed mid-edit the indices shift, breaking any e2e test that targeted ch-item-{n}. Switch to a stable per-row uuid (e.g., ch-item-{uuid}-qty).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on Phase B testids — allocations-page + alloc-add + 13 dialog testids + 1 alloc-return row; asset-lifecycle-page + asset-select + 4 lifecycle-*-add buttons with their 14 documented field testids + lifecycle-save; challans-page + challans-add + 11 dialog testids + 3 challan-row-* with view/receive/delete + challan-qr-block canvas + e-signature stamp panel; 3 sidebar nav entries; 3 procurement workspace tiles.

test_credentials: admin@erp.com / Admin@123 (super_admin — RBAC wildcard read + write on all 3 resources)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create one TEST_ALC_ITEM_<hex> inventory item (quantity starts at 20, ends at 19 after the inter-site-transfer round-trip + 1 unit issued via the non-returnable allocation), several ALC-2026-#### allocations (one fully returned, one non-returnable, one deleted, one partially returned), a TEST_AMC_VENDOR AMC + a TEST_LAB calibration + a TEST_WARR warranty stamp on the first asset (Welding Machine Inverter), and three CH-2026-#### challans (one received delivery, one received inter-site-transfer, one created+deleted). None of this data is cleaned up — it accumulates as historical records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B testids: Allocations — allocations-page, alloc-add, alloc-row-{id}, alloc-return-{id}. Issue dialog — alloc-kind, alloc-item-select, alloc-item-name, alloc-qty, alloc-unit, alloc-to-type, alloc-project, alloc-date, alloc-return-date, alloc-returnable, alloc-condition, alloc-remarks, alloc-save. Asset Lifecycle — asset-lifecycle-page, asset-select (native <select> — use page.select_option), sections lifecycle-dep / lifecycle-amc / lifecycle-cal / lifecycle-warr each with {testid}-add button. Dialog field testids: dep-period, dep-method, dep-open, dep-amount, dep-close; amc-vendor, amc-start, amc-end, amc-amount, amc-coverage, amc-note; cal-by, cal-date, cal-result (native <select>), cal-next, cal-note; warr-vendor, warr-start, warr-expiry, warr-terms. Save button: lifecycle-save. Existing rows: dep-row-{id}, amc-row-{id}, cal-row-{id}. Challans — challans-page, challans-add, challan-row-{id}, challan-view-{id}, challan-receive-{id}, challan-delete-{id}. Create dialog — ch-type, ch-from, ch-to, ch-vehicle, ch-driver, ch-phone, ch-dispatch, ch-add-item, ch-item-0-name, ch-item-0-qty, ch-save. View dialog — challan-qr-block (renders a <canvas>). Sidebar — nav-allocations, nav-asset-lifecycle, nav-challans (all under 'Commerce' group). Endpoints: GET/POST/DELETE /api/allocations, POST /api/allocations/{id}/return; GET /api/assets/{id}/lifecycle, POST /api/assets/{id}/depreciation|amc|calibration, PUT /api/assets/{id}/warranty; GET/POST/DELETE /api/challans, GET /api/challans/{id}, POST /api/challans/{id}/receive. Run: cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://worksite-command.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iteration21_phase_b.py -v
rca of the issue: Not a bug fix — new module verification. Phase B (Material/Asset Allocations + Asset Lifecycle + QR-stamped Challans w/ lightweight e-signature) is delivered correctly: ALC-YYYY-#### auto-numbering works, inventory.quantity is decremented on issue and credited on return with matching inventory_transactions outward/inward rows, partial vs full return correctly toggles status='partially_returned' vs 'returned', non-returnable allocations refuse /return with 400, delete-after-return is blocked, delete-before-return reverses stock. Asset lifecycle persists depreciation/AMC/calibration rows AND stamps the derived fields (current_book_value, last_dep_period, amc_active, amc_expiry, last_calibration_date, next_calibration_due, warranty_vendor/start/expiry/terms) on the asset doc. Challans auto-number CH-YYYY-#### with qr_payload='CHALLAN:{no}|{id}', inter-site transfers immediately debit source inventory and credit destination on receive, receive captures {name,user_id,user_name,ip,signed_at} e-signature, delete is blocked once received. All 22 backend asserts pass and all documented testids resolve in the UI. The 12 critical code-review items are pre-emptive (race conditions, X-Forwarded-For, duplicate depreciation periods, inter-site stock guard, partial-asset-return, error-toast surfacing) — none block Phase B acceptance but should be considered before scaling.
